name: Do I need a lawyer for my Boise hearing loss workers comp case?
description: Strongly recommended for appeals and max benefits.[5]

mainEntity.name: Do I need a lawyer for my Boise hearing loss workers comp case?

acceptedAnswer.text: Strongly recommended for appeals and max benefits.[5]
acceptedAnswer.description: **Yes, especially if denied or complex, as lawyers increase benefit awards by 20-40% on average.** They handle evidence collection, insurer negotiations, and appeals against causation disputes.[5] Free consultations common; they take fees from winnings. Self-representing risks lowballs or denials on technicalities.[4] Essential for proving occupational vs. age-related loss.[1]
